title: 10 best herbal tinctures for jaundice
description: Chamomile tinctures helps with jaundice because of its soothing and calming properties, which can ease digestive discomfort and reduce inflammation in the liver. The antioxidant-rich properties of chamomile also help to protect the liver from further damage and promote its natural function. Additionally, chamomile's gentle sedative effects can help to calm irritability and anxiety often associated with jaundice, allowing for a more peaceful recovery process.
